title: The River's Final Commitment

features.name: the-mouth-where-both-currents-merge
features.desc-on-touch: the river flowing north and the river flowing south finally touch; in the collision they discover they were always the same current, divided by comparison

features.name: the-dissolution-into-salt
features.desc-on-touch: freshwater and ocean learn each other; the river stops being river and becomes something that is both and neither

features.name: the-stones-worn-smooth-by-argument
features.desc-on-touch: riverbeds marked by the rocks that two towns debated over—polished smooth by friction and the river's own endless rereading of its path

features.name: the-delta-where-the-river-forgets-itself
features.desc-on-touch: water breaks into channels and loses its single voice; in dissolution there is finally a kind of peace—the river no longer has to be one thing

features.name: the-horizon-line-where-water-meets-absence
features.desc-on-touch: the river expands into an ocean; the comparison finally has room to breathe; both towns' histories dissolve into the salt and become indistinguishable

inscription: where the river becomes ocean, both towns' versions of truth finally dissolve into each other and become something neither of them could have been alone

file.name: TownHistory_Northern_and_Southern_Confluence_Final.txt
file.note: the two histories merge; inconsistencies resolve as 'regional variation'; checksum fails: emotionally valid / formally unstable

exits.label: back up the river to where the mirror channel flows
outward into the open ocean where all rivers end
along the strand where the land learns to dissolve
